**Credits** -- photos via [Pixabay](https://pixabay.com).
<!--
crystal : https://pixabay.com/photos/amethyst-crystal-gemstone-purple-7552587/
lightning.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/lightning-thunderstorm-super-cell-2568381/
mouse.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/mouse-technology-desk-computer-4979036/
bridge.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/george-washington-bridge-2098351/
pendulum.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/pendulum-newtons-cradle-silver-3329574/
butterfly.jpg : https://pixabay.com/illustrations/butterfly-waves-flapping-its-wings-4847628/
pyramid.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/pyramid-egypt-giza-monument-3953370/
engine.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/macro-cogwheel-gear-engine-vintage-1452987/
programming.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/technology-computer-code-javascript-1283624/
chemistry.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/glass-fire-warmth-chemistry-1449943/
abacus.jpg: https://pixabay.com/photos/abacus-asian-culture-counting-frame-7019994/
aurora.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/northern-lights-aurora-borealis-1197755/
univers.jpg : https://pixabay.com/photos/milky-way-human-starry-sky-star-4667644/
-->
